pages.raw_text:
The Kettle Valley line is in a
prosperous condition and has pur-
chased 40 new ore cars.


The Northern Pacific surveyors
are now camped at Lyle, on the
bank of the Columbia river.


Superintendent Forest of the
Spokane Falls & NORTHERN has
started on a tour.of inspection.
The yards on the Great North
ern popularity known as "termi-
nails" will hereafter be known as
delta"


General Western Agent f. w.
Vaughan of the Great Northern ex-
press, with headquarters In this
city. has resigned.


Ira b. Richards fills the vacancy
caused by the promotion Of Train
master Abee of the Tacoma division
of the Northern Pacific.


Thirty-fve principal shippers Of
the Pacific coast lumber and shin
giles have formed headquarters
at Winona, Mimi. for the purpose
of scrutinizing freight rates.


J. C. Stuart, general superintend-
ent Of the Baltimore 4 Ohio, has
resigned and will retire from rail-
way service for the present. This
will cause many changes on the
b. q O. system.


The Snake River Valley Railway
company. a new corporation, is the
result of friendly agreement be-
tween the o. II. g. N. and the
Northern Pacific. The Snake Valley
road will handle the traffic for both
lines between Lewiston and RI
paria.


The United Brotherhood of Rail.
way Employees have purchased a
